title: Rise of the Empire era
content:
{{Top|real|imp}} {{Otheruses|Rise of the Empire}} {{Quote|What I remember about the rise of the Empire is… is how quiet it was. During the waning hours of the Clone Wars, the 501st was discreetly transferred back to Coruscant. It was a silent trip; We all knew what was about to happen, what we were about to do. Did we have any doubts? Any private traitorous thoughts? Perhaps, but no one said a word. Not on the flight to Coruscant, not when Order 66 came down, and not when we marched into the Jedi Temple. Not a word.|[[Retired clone trooper|Anonymous]] [[501st Legion/Legends|501st]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]|''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''}} [[File:Era-imp.png|right]] The '''Rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] era''', sometimes referred to as the '''Prequel era''', takes place between [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] (the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]]) and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] (the [[Battle of Toprawa]]). In other words, it encompasses the whole [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]]. The events of the [[Prequel trilogy]] ([[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], and [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]) take place during the twilight of this era. The events of the ''Clone Wars'' [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|film]] and [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|TV series]] also happen in this era. ===[[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]–[[980 BBY]]===
